name: ai-assistant-extension
description: Cross-browser AI assistant extension built with React and TypeScript

scripts.build: npm run build:chromium && npm run build:firefox
scripts.build:all: npm run build && cd connector-api && npm run build
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:api
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && npm run lint:api
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:api
scripts.validate:all: npm run typecheck:all && npm run lint:all && npm run test:all && npm run build:all
scripts.setup: npm ci && cd connector-api && npm ci && cd ..
